_publications._publicationTitle: Development of a Novel Biomarker Platform for Profiling Key Protein-Protein Interactions to Predict the Efficacy of BH3-Mimetic Drugs.

_contextSnippet: we saw a reduction in the HSMCB signal (MFI) in the BIM-siRNA-treated cells compared with untreated cells...these findings indicate that the HSMCB and HSBXB PRIMABs are reliant on BIM
details: Specific binding to MCL-1:BIM complex, showed reduction in signal with BIM siRNA knockdown and required BIM for binding
